MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Counsel informs the Court the matter is unopposed.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Ernest Brown & Company, Atty. McCall K. Baugh's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.

Granted.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)
